Question: Solve. Round to the nearest whole percent. Veronica is planning to make muffins from a mix. The package says each muffin will be 230 calories and 60 calories will be from fat. What percent of the total calories is from fat?
o3 Answer:
To find what percent of the muffin’s calories come from fat, compare the “calories from fat” to the total calories.

calories from fat = 60  
total calories     = 230

Percent from fat = (calories from fat ÷ total calories) × 100  
                 = (60 ÷ 230) × 100  
                 ≈ 0.2609 × 100
